name: Steak Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and red pepper flakes. Mix well.
2. Slice onions into thin rings.
3. Place onion slices in milk and marinate for 15 minutes.
4. Drain the onion slices and pat them dry with paper towels.
5. Dust the onion slices with the flour and red pepper mixture.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or pot to at least 350°F (175°C).
7. Deep fry onion slices until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
8. Place hot steaks on a plate and broil under the broiler for desired doneness.
9. Split sub rolls and place steaks inside. Top with fried onions.
Note: Turn off heat sources when finished cooking.
